example: She is very resourceful and can solve problems quickly.
zh: 足智多謀的，有解決問題能力的
ja: 機転が利く、資源をうまく活用できる

example: Einstein was a genius in physics.
ja: 天才、非常に優れた才能を持つ人

example: The internet connection is very fast today.
We can stream videos online anytime.
ja: ストリーミング、連続してデータを送ること

example: The phone call was breaking up due to poor signal.
ja: 通信が途切れる、音声が途切れ途切れになる

example: She used her communication pad to talk to her friends.
They worked together to free the trapped animal.
He swung the bat and hit the ball.
ja: バット（野球のバット）、コウモリ

example: Be careful when crossing the street.
